allow: PowerShell($nvcc = Get-Command nvcc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($nvcc\) { Write-Output $nvcc.Source; & nvcc --version } else { Write-Output "nvcc not found" }; $msb = Get-Command msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($msb\) { Write-Output $msb.Source } else { Write-Output "msbuild not found" })

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; nvcc -c kernel.cu -o "$env:TEMP\\kernel_test.obj" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr -Xcudafe --diag_suppress=20012 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\kernel_test.obj"\) { Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\\kernel_test.obj" }; $out = nvcc -c kernel.cu -o "$env:TEMP\\kernel_test.obj" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr 2>&1; $errors = $out | Select-String -Pattern "error" -SimpleMatch; if \($errors\) { Write-Output "=== ERRORS ==="; $errors } else { Write-Output "=== NO ERRORS ===" }; Write-Output "obj exists: $\(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\kernel_test.obj"\)")

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; $out = nvcc kernel.cu -o "$env:TEMP\\rtbvh.exe" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr 2>&1; $errors = $out | Select-String -Pattern "error" -SimpleMatch; if \($errors\) { Write-Output "=== ERRORS ==="; $errors } else { Write-Output "=== LINK OK ===" }; Write-Output "exe exists: $\(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\rtbvh.exe"\)")

PowerShell($bvhPpm = "$env:TEMP\\output.ppm"; $basePpm = "$env:TEMP\\rtbase\\output.ppm"; $h1 = \(Get-FileHash $bvhPpm -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; $h2 = \(Get-FileHash $basePpm -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; Write-Output "BVH    : $h1  \($\(\(Get-Item $bvhPpm\).Length\) bytes\)"; Write-Output "Base   : $h2  \($\(\(Get-Item $basePpm\).Length\) bytes\)"; if \($h1 -eq $h2\) { Write-Output "RESULT : IDENTICAL \(pixel-perfect\)" } else { Write-Output "RESULT : DIFFER" })

PowerShell($a = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\output.ppm"; $b = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rtbase\\output.ppm"; Write-Output "BVH lines: $\($a.Count\)  Base lines: $\($b.Count\)"; Write-Output "Header BVH : $\($a[0..2] -join ' | '\)"; Write-Output "Header Base: $\($b[0..2] -join ' | '\)"; $diff = 0; $maxc = [Math]::Min\($a.Count,$b.Count\); for \($i=3; $i -lt $maxc; $i++\) { if \($a[$i] -ne $b[$i]\) { $diff++ } }; Write-Output "Differing pixel lines: $diff / $\($maxc-3\)")

PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { Write-Output "python: $\($py.Source\)"; python -c "import PIL; print\('PIL ok'\)" 2>&1 } else { Write-Output "no python" }; $magick = Get-Command magick -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($magick\) { Write-Output "magick: $\($magick.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "no magick" })

PowerShell($bvhPpm = "$env:TEMP\\output.ppm"; $basePpm = "$env:TEMP\\rtbase\\output.ppm"; $h1 = \(Get-FileHash $bvhPpm -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; $h2 = \(Get-FileHash $basePpm -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; Write-Output "BVH    : $h1  \($\(\(Get-Item $bvhPpm\).Length\) bytes\)"; Write-Output "Base   : $h2  \($\(\(Get-Item $basePpm\).Length\) bytes\)"; if \($h1 -eq $h2\) { Write-Output "RESULT : IDENTICAL \(pixel-perfect\)" } else { Write-Output "RESULT : DIFFER - counting..."; $a = Get-Content $bvhPpm; $b = Get-Content $basePpm; $diff=0; for \($i=3; $i -lt $a.Count; $i++\) { if \($a[$i] -ne $b[$i]\) { $diff++ } }; Write-Output "Differing pixels: $diff / $\($a.Count-3\)" })

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; nvcc kernel.cu -o "$env:TEMP\\rtfinal.exe" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error" -SimpleMatch; Write-Output "built")

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; nvcc kernel.cu -DUSE_LINEAR -o "$env:TEMP\\rtlin.exe" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error" -SimpleMatch; Write-Output "built linear")

PowerShell($clBin = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.44.35207\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64"; $env:Path = "$clBin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekend"; nvcc kernel.cu -DBVH_NO_BBOX_CULL -o "$env:TEMP\\rtnocull.exe" -std=c++17 -ccbin $clBin --expt-relaxed-constexpr 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error" -SimpleMatch; Write-Output "built nocull")

PowerShell($sln = "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA.sln"; $vcvars = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\VC\\Auxiliary\\Build\\vcvars64.bat"; $cmd = "call `"$vcvars`" && msbuild `"$sln`" /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /m /nologo /v:minimal"; cmd /c $cmd 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50; Write-Output "=== exit: $LASTEXITCODE ===")

PowerShell($sln = "D:\\Github\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA\\RayTracinginOneWeekendinCUDA.sln"; $vcvars = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Auxiliary\\Build\\vcvars64.bat"; $cmd = "call `"$vcvars`" && msbuild `"$sln`" /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /m /nologo /v:minimal /p:PostBuildEventUseInBuild=false"; cmd /c $cmd 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40; Write-Output "=== exit: $LASTEXITCODE ===")
